brief_summary: Horizontal 3-milestone group buy timeline. Coral open marker at 2026-05-15, coral filled bar spanning the ~5-week window, coral close marker at ~2026-06-20, dotted gap, muted ship marker at Q3/Q4 2026. Below: three feature chips naming doubleshot ABS, 10 regional storefronts, and WS1-white base color.
data_sources: gmk-cyl-ramune-group-buy.mdx § 'Buying notes' — 'The window opened 2026-05-15 and runs through approximately 2026-06-20.'
gmk-cyl-ramune-group-buy.mdx § 'Buying notes' — 'Estimated ship is Q3/Q4 2026, consistent with GMK lead times on a doubleshot ABS set of this scope.'

gmk-cyl-ramune-group-buy.mdx § 'Buying notes' — 'Region coverage is multi-vendor and global: Divinikey (US), Prototypist (UK), Geonworks (KR), Yushakobo (JP), and six additional regional storefronts.'
